assertions.description: Analyzer correctly identifies 9 gerber files (F.Cu, B.Cu, F.Mask, B.Mask, F.Paste, B.Paste, F.SilkS, B.SilkS, Edge.Cuts) plus 2 drill files (PTH, NPTH). completeness.complete=true and no missing_required layers.
The PTH drill file contains 124 via holes (0.3mm diameter) matching the PCB analyzer's via_count=124 exactly. 4 component holes (0.6mm) and 2 NPTH holes also present.

INCORRECT: The PCB analyzer reports 14 components on the front side and 42 on the back. The gerber analyzer reports 15 on the front and 41 on the back. The total of 56 agrees, but the per-side count differs by 1. This is likely caused by a component at the boundary of the two analyses (different attribution of a component to F.Cu vs B.Cu). The discrepancy should be investigated.
